artifact_record_schema.path_policy: repo-relative exact path only; broad repo roots and wildcard paths are invalid
artifact_record_schema.proof_boundary: artifact records can point to evidence but cannot convert reports, plans, or narrative context into implementation proof

source_ref_schema.source_reference_policy: each source ref must identify one exact repo-relative path, source task, evidence kind, proof status, and stale-ref treatment

relationship_schema.relationship_policy: relationships must use deterministic ordering and known artifact ids only

inspection_route_schema.route_policy: inspection routes must name an exact file path and exact command; broad scans and wildcards are invalid

caveat_schema.caveat_policy: stale refs require explicit caveats naming the affected ref, path, declared boundary, observed boundary, accepted reason, and preserved scope

current_posture.posture_statement: R16 is active through R16-009 only; R16-010 through R16-026 remain planned only.

non_claims: artifact map contract is model/contract proof only
artifact map contract is not a generated artifact map
artifact map contract is not runtime memory
artifact map contract is not retrieval or vector runtime
artifact map contract is not audit execution
artifact map contract is not workflow execution
